text:
But… What Even is Knowledge Work?
- Knowledge work is all work where the main input is information and the main output is a (broadly) actionable judgement.
- It’s tautological with retrieval: if you need search, it’s likely a knowledge problem, and if it’s a knowledge problem, you probably need search.
- In the real world, it is everywhere: Lawyers, Academics, Software Engineers, Paralegals, Doctors, Actuaries, etc... all perform knowledge work on a daily basis.
- Each knowledge industry has contributed to the ever-improving structuring of knowledge work...
- ... But agents have focused on a special case: software engineering.
